DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE MATTER. PLAINTIFF RONALD TREBBIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; AND FOR PROSPECTIVE MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 4, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE PRO-TEM: DENNIS HYDE; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SANDY LEE, CSR # 9971

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF RONALD TREBBIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; AND FOR PROSPECTIVE MONETARY SANCTIONS - MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES IS GRANTED WITHIN 90 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING PROTECTIVE ORDER WITHIN 30 DAYS. TRIAL DATE TO BE CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 26, 2015 PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. REQUEST FOR SANCTION WAS DENIED BY THE COURT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: HOLLY SAYERS, CSR #13678 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And For Prospective Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BENJAMIN BECK OF THE STRATEGIC LEGAL PRACTICES, TEL. NO. (310)277-1040 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL EFSTRATIS OF LECLAIR RYAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 913-4957 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
HOLLY SAYERS OF THE AIKEN WELCH COURT REPORTERS, TEL. NO. 1-877-451-1580, COURT REPORTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF RONALD TREBBIN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And For Prospective Monetary Sanctions - Motion to compel further responses is granted within 90 days from notice of entry of order. Parties to meet and confer regarding Protective order within 30 days. Trial date to be continued to October 26, 2015 per the agreement of the parties. Request for sanction was denied by the court. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Holly Sayers, CSR #13678 =302/ehg
